name: CockroachDB
description: CockroachDB single-node SQL database. Port 26257 for SQL, 8080 for Admin UI.

variables.name: COCKROACH_PASSWORD
variables.description: Root password secret placeholder for a future secure workflow.

variables.name: COCKROACH_INSECURE
variables.description: Set 'true' for dev mode (no auth, default). Set 'false' to enable password auth once you add your own TLS/cert workflow.

variables.name: COCKROACH_DATABASE
variables.description: Default database to create on startup.
